name: pr_qx_companion_tick
drl:
query BVals(long $v)
    B(k == $v)
end

rule R1
when
    Tick($n : n)
    ?BVals($x;)
then
    insert(new Out($n, $x));
end
_finding: The companion-rescue cell (round 20, pairs with pr_qx_bare_snapshot): the same pull query behind a REACTIVE companion pattern. The new Tick re-triggers evaluation and the ?query CE then sees every row including the late-arrived B(2) - the companion is the idiomatic bridge for cross-fire lateness. Row-per-activation cardinality on re-evaluation is the byte-checked observable.
